name: Panned Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Select young tender squash and wash well.
2. Remove the tips from each end of the squash.
3. Cut the squash into small pieces, leaving the skin on unless it is very tough.
4. Melt the butter in a skillet until slightly brown.
5. Add the squash to the skillet and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Cover and cook for 10 or 15 minutes at moderate heat.
7. Remove the cover and continue cooking for a few more minutes to allow liquid to evaporate.
8. Serve hot.
